name: Elemental HERO Glow Neos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> グロー・ネオス
desc:
"Elemental HERO Neos" + "Neo-Spacian Glow Moss"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards you control into the Deck. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Return this card to the Extra Deck. Once per turn, during your Main Phase 1: You can target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy that target, and if you do, apply this effect based on its type. ● Monster: This card cannot attack this turn. ● Spell: This card can attack directly this turn. ● Trap: Change this card to Defense Position.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Deck
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns itself from field to Extra Deck
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
